name: Bales Arena
description: Bales Arena is a place to play pickleball in Dayton, OH. There are 8 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Fee required — $5 per day or monthly membership available

name: Beavercreek Clay Courts Tennis Club
description: Beavercreek Clay Courts Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dayton, OH. There are 3 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Black Barn Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Black Barn Pickleball in Dayton, OH! There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: Dayton Metro Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Dayton Metro Pickleball in Dayton, OH! There are 3 indoor hard, concrete, and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, lights, youth programming, trainers or lessons, food, water, a pro shop or equipment store, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. Reservations are available.
open_play_schedule: Schedules are posted on Court Reserve

name: Dominick Lofino Park
description: There are two sets of pickleball courts. One set of six overlaid on two tennis courts with portable nets where people typically play. The other set of courts is made up of two on top of two tennis courts using the tennis nets. All pickleball lines are permanent.

name: Kennedy Park
description: All brand new - expanded from 6 courts to 12 courts

name: KTC Quail Tennis Club - KTC
description: KTC Quail Tennis Club - KTC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dayton, OH. There are 24 hard courts. 16 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
hours: Mon-Fri: 8:00am – 11:00pm Sat-Sun: 8:00am – 10:00pm It is our purpose to provide a pleasant atmosphere and to offer tennis activities and events that encourage friendships, family time, fitness, and fun. We pledge to continually improve the facilities, our programming, and your tennis experience. website collaboration and imaging from Alert5Media & Alert5 Drone Services
